name: team-collab
description: Git-native asynchronous multi-agent collaboration for school group AI assignments. Turns a GitHub repo into a shared blackboard so multiple Claude Code instances can work offline, push when online, and converge without a central server.

teamcollab.description: Local MCP stdio server wrapping git operations as 14 tools (team_init, task_*, glossary_*, events_recent, sync_now, search_blackboard, read_artifact).
